titleStmt.title: SII 18.148: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 148. (B.K. No. 103 of 1933-34.) HŪLIHAḶḶI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in front of the temple of Vīrabhadra.

summary.p: This inscription, which refers itself to the reign of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalladēva, is dated in the 6th year of his reign, Rudhirōdgāri, Śrāvaṇa Pūrṇimā, Monday, lunar eclipse, Saṁkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1143, July 28 on which day both the Saṁkrānti and the lunar eclipse occurred. The week-day cited in the record, however, is a mistake for Wednesday.

It records a grant of land to the god Svayambhu Kalidēvasvāmi of Ulivaḷḷi (modern Hūlihaḷḷi), probably by a certain Āchaṇṇa. Mahāpra hāna, Sēnādhipati Kannaḍa-Sandhivigrahi and Paṭṭasāhaṇi Bamma dvayya was governing Banavase Twelve-thousand at that time. It also records the grant of income derived from certain taxes, made to the same god by the Suṅkada-Heggaḍe (name lost) of Innūṟāṟuṁ-bāḍ and others. It was made at the instance of the officer (name lost) who was in-charge of hejjunka and vaḍdarāvuḷa of Banavāsi Twelve-thousand.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarā
mūlastaṁbhāya sambhavē . gaṇapatyāya namaḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsrayakulatilaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatu pratā pacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vi
jayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma
nu mahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati kannaḍasandhivigrahi hiriyadaṁṇḍanāya
kaṁ paṭṭasāhaṇi bammadēvayyaṁgaḷu banavase pannircchāsiramu
maṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁdāḷuttamire . mala(ṁ)pa
ra mātē baravollaṁ saṁgrāmadalli pulugarccidaraṁ kollaṁ bēḍida vandige
yillennada kuḍuva dāni parihitacarita . Ātana piriya magaṁ balligāyuṁ
ḍanudāraguṇaveṁtteṁdaḍe . nuḍidittennaṁ bēḍidaḍēdiyuḍugade kuḍuvane
ḍaṟuvarigaḷa taleyaṁ poḍeseṁṇḍāḍuvaneṁndaḍe poḍaviyali balligayuṁḍagā
ruṁ doreyē . Ātana kulavadhu negaḷdī bhūtaḷadoḷu caṁndikaveyu bāga
veyuṁ mātēṁ sucaritreyaraṁ tātaṁganukūlateyāgi naḍeyutipparu .
Ātana tammaṁ kēsavanāyakanudāraguṇaveṁteṁdaḍe . Āseyane tōṟi bhu
dhara viḷāsaṁ keḍuvaṁnnamirisi tudiyoḷu pusiyiṁ bēsaṟisi kaḷevakri
tyada rāsigaḷaṁ kēsiyaṇṇyanēṁ meccuvanē . Ēḷuṁ kaḍalumanoyikane līḷā
mātradale dāṁṭi digibhada beṁnaṁ māṇade paridēṟuva gāḷu
vo kēṣavana kīrtti mūṟuṁ jagadoḷu . nuḍidaḍe karṇnana vacanaṁ ku
ḍuveḍeyoḷu cārudattanā baliguttaṁ kuḍuvaṁndade kuḍutippaṁ
poḍaviyalācaṁṇnaneṁdu pogaḷuyudu lōka .
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalla variṣada 6
neya rudhirōdugārisaṁvatsarada srāvaṇada puṁṇnameyuṁ
sōmavāramuṁ sōmagrahaṇamuṁ saṁkrāntiyuṁ bya
tīpātamuṁ kūḍibaralu Ulivaḷḷiya śrīsvamyaṁbhuka
lidēvasvāmige nanndādīvige khaṇḍasvaṭṭikajīrṇnōddhā
rakaṁ [Ū]riṁ baḍaga ge keṁgāḍu
ḍiya gaḷeyalu matta Ereya mattaleraḍu ke
ṟeya keḷage koḍaṁgeya ba maṇnu kammaṁ I
ppattu tōṁṭṭadaloṁdu liyavaḷḷi Okkalaloṁdumaṁ
śrīsvayaṁbukalidēva samastaprasastisa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahā rcchāsirada hejjuṁka vaḍḍa
rāyuḷada daṁṇḍanāya yyaṁgaḷa besadiṁ yinnūṟauṟuṁ
bāḍada suṁkadaheggaḍe tīkimayyanu biṭima
yyanuṁ bammaṇayyanu . Iṁtini taḷabaṁṇḍadavasāya
da hēṟina suṁka hattakoṁnduma hattiya maḷaveya suṁka nū
ṟakkaydumaṁ Eleya hēṟu hattakonndumaṁ . Aḍakeya suṁkadoḷa
ge lakkake paṇa Eraḍumaṁ Okkaludeṟe sēse kāṇikeyoḷage O
kkalaloṁdettumaṁ . Ā titti yoḷage śrīsvayaṁbukalidēvasvāmiRead tithi.
ge koṭṭaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁndarā śaṣṭirvva
riśasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ (.) jāyatē (.) krimi . Eḷḷahē
ṟu hattakoṁndumaṁ (.) togariya hēṟu hattakonndumaṁ (.) kāpaṭa
sīreya maḷave Oṁdakke vīsa Eraḍu . na viśaṁ viśamuśvāhaThis verse is very corrupt.
dēvaśvaṁ (.) viśamūścatē (.) viśamēkākina (.) hanti dēvaśvaṁ putra
pautrika . vritta . krama(ṁ)diṁdiṁtidaneyde kāyda puru
saṁgāyuṁ mahāśrīyumakke yidaṁ (.) kāyade kādu pāpi
ge kurukṣētraṁgaḷalu vāraṇāsiyoḷerkkōṭṭi munīṁdraraṁ kavile
yaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁndudoṁdayasaṁ sārggumideṁndu sāṟi
ḷākṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷu . naḍavadhikārigaḷappa kuḍave
patihitadiṁndāṁ kaḍidama
Digital edition of SII 18.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
